description: Style NoteThe German brand puma is known world over for their infusion of colour and minimalist styling into classic wardrobe staples. Specially designed to keep you dry this T-shirt easily makes it to our wishlist for the Summer. Pair it with distressed denims and flip-flops for a rugged look or with track pants and sneakers for a workout.Product DetailsWhite T-shirt, raglan sleeves with flatlock, black mesh panel insert at front and sleeve, printed branding on left chest, curved back hemMaterials and Care100% polyesterWash and iron inside outMachine wash warm Warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model(height 6'and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
